english: On the great yoga seat on the banks of the Bhima river
Given as a boon to Pundarika by great sages
Who came and stands as the source of bliss
I worship Panduranga, the symbol of the Supreme Brahman
Clothed in lightning-like yellow, resembling a blue cloud
Beloved of Lakshmi, served perfectly by exclusive devotees
With lotus eyes beautiful in his sports of protecting the world
I worship Panduranga, the symbol of the Supreme Brahman
This sacred Pandurangashtakam — whoever reads it with devotion
roman: Panduranga ashtakam punyam yah pated bhakti samyutah

english: Always receives the grace of Pundarikaksha (Vishnu)
